rationale: Transactions spec requires w:majority when retrying commitTransaction; driver was not implementing this.
Spec requires lsid/txnNumber/startTransaction on first command; count_documents failed to start transaction properly.
Adding spec test that reads ignore db/collection readConcern in transactions; child of DRIVERS-576.
Making WriteConcernFailed spec test pass for convenient transaction API; test infrastructure fix.
Adding timeout for with_transaction per spec PR #446; implementing missing spec requirement.
Duplicated authsource key in test support code; internal test suite warning, not a spec deviation.
Ruby-specific guard against next/break in with_transaction block; API ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
Tutorial documentation for convenient transaction API; docs improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
URI options spec specifies connectTimeout default of 10; driver had wrong default, fixing to match spec.
Documentation for session options on start_session; docs improvement, not a spec nonconformance.
Ruby 1.9 CI test failure due to hitimes gem incompatibility; build/dependency issue.
Optimization to fail fast on empty server set; improvement not contradicting a specific spec rule.
Connection pool disconnect reconnecting connections; internal implementation cleanup, no specific spec rule violated.
Test suite refactor to always define examples; internal test infrastructure, no spec behavior.
Adding logging for ismaster retries on monitoring connections; diagnostic improvement, no spec deviation.
Unknown servers not marked as such in summaries; thin description, unclear if specific spec rule violated.
Test suite helper refactor replacing require_scram_sha_256_support; internal test code change.
Updating change stream test to expect OperationFailure on 4.2 for unprojecting id; test update for server behavior change.
InvalidMechanism error message lists wrong/incomplete mechanisms; error message quality, no spec rule violated.
Improved diagnostics on server selection failure; observability improvement, no spec deviation.
Internal refactor of connection handshake to avoid recursion; implementation cleanup, no spec rule contradicted.
Pool reconnects during stale socket closure causing unexpected auth attempts; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Connection pool scoping refactor to avoid stale connection reuse; architectural improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
Method named hashed_password returns plain text; misleading method name, no spec behavior involved.
App metadata cached per server rather than per connection; internal caching bug causing intermittent test failures.
Fixing transaction spec tests broken by latest server version change; test maintenance.
Transaction spec runner not passing w:majority correctly; bug in test runner code, not in driver behavior.
Tx API spec tests triggering loop breakage warnings; bug in spec test runner, not in driver behavior.
Internal refactor to DRY operation execution for exhaust cursor support; no spec deviation.
Documentation missing scram256 and gssapi as accepted auth mechanisms; docs bug, not a conformance issue.
abort_transaction must always set session state to aborted; non-Mongo exceptions bypassed this spec requirement.
Adding auth mechanism to error messages for diagnostics; observability improvement, no spec violation.
Better error messages indicating server address and SSL status on handshake failure; diagnostics improvement.
Adding warning logs on handshake/auth network failures; observability improvement, no spec rule violated.
SDAM spec says close idle sockets on network error; driver not implementing this and error-handling behaviors.
Updating BigDecimal.new to BigDecimal() in bson-ruby for Ruby 2.6 deprecation; dependency/API change.
Performance improvement for Date BSON serialization; no spec behavior change.
Time.now.freeze causes frozen object mutation errors in user test code; implementation bug with no spec involvement.
Detect/report all servers in ghost state; diagnostic/UX improvement, no specific spec rule violated.
Test helper improvement for RS name mismatch detection; internal test infrastructure.
Remove global cluster query methods from spec helper; internal test code cleanup.
URI parser incorrectly handles paths in option values (e.g. tlsCAFile); URI parsing spec requires correct option parsing.
URI options like tlsCAFile broken by incorrect Symbol conversion; connection string spec requires string values preserved.
Documentation for running tests on replica set and sharded cluster; docs/test contributor experience.
CANONICALIZE_HOST_NAME misspelled in documentation; docs typo, not a spec conformance issue.
Typo in tlsAllowInvalidCertificates documentation; docs error, no driver behavior change.
DNS seedlist spec requires 3+ hostname components; trailing dot bypasses validation, violating spec requirement.
Documentation guidance on min pool size for production; docs improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Stop reconnecting closed connections after network error; implementation improvement, no clear spec rule contradicted.
Create connection objects on demand only; internal implementation refactor, no spec rule violated.
